//: Dedicated tsconfig for scripts/bundle-types.ts. The project tsconfig pulls in Cloudflare's worker types (`worker-configuration.d.ts`), whose global `Element` (HTMLRewriter) shadows the DOM `Element`. dts-bundle-generator would then resolve `Element` in remix/ui's mixin/css types to the Cloudflare one and inline it, breaking `mix`/`css` assignability in the playground. Keep this config free of Cloudflare types so `Element` stays the DOM `Element`.
